member.office_address: 2419 Rayburn House Office Building Washington DC 20515-4329

form_analysis.form_header_text: FY27 General Appropriations Request Form | Formulario de Solicitud para el Proceso de Asignaciones Generales para el Año Fiscal 2027
form_analysis.form_instructions_text: Submissions will be received on a rolling deadline. Las propuestas se recibirán en forma continua. IF YOU DO NOT FULLY ANSWER ALL QUESTIONS, YOUR APPLICATIONS WILL BE REJECTED AND WILL NOT BE REVIEWED. PLEASE NOTE THAT DUE TO A HIGH NUMBER OF APPLICATIONS, OUR TEAM WILL NOT BE ABLE TO FOLLOW UP ON INCOMPLETE APPLICATIONS. SI NO RESPONDE COMPLETAMENTE A TODAS LAS PREGUNTAS, SUS SOLICITUDES SERÁN RECHAZADAS Y NO SERÁN REVISADAS. TENGA EN CUENTA QUE, DEBIDO AL ELEVADO NÚMERO DE SOLICITUDES, NUESTRO EQUIPO NO PODRÁ HACER UN SEGUIMIENTO A LAS SOLICITUDES INCOMPLETAS. If you have multiple requests, please submit a separate form for each request. Please provide as much of the requested information as possible to ensure we can fully evaluate your request. Si tiene más de una solicitud, favor de enviar un formulario distinto para cada solicitud. Proporcione toda la información posible para que podamos evaluar su solicitud. DO NOT USE THIS FORM FOR COMMUNITY PROJECT FUNDING REQUESTS. House Appropriations Committee has not released guidelines for FY27 appropriations submission process. The Office of Congresswoman Sylvia R. Garcia will not receive community project requests until receiving more information from the House Appropriations Committee. NO UTILICE ESTE FORMULARIO PARA SOLICITUDES DE FINANCIACIÓN DE PROYECTOS COMUNITARIOS. El Comité de Asignaciones de la Cámara de Representates no ha emitido pautas para el proceso anual de entrega de pedidos de asignaciones para el año fiscal 2027. La oficina de la Congresista Sylvia R. Garcia no va a recibir solicitudes de projectos comunitarios hasta recibir más información del Comité de Asignaciones de la Cámara de Representantes.

sections.description: Details about the organization and the person submitting the request.

fields.label: Organization Name (Nombre de su organización):
Website (Sitio web):
First Name of Requestor (Primer nombre del solicitante):
Last Name of Requestor (Apellido del solicitante):
Email Address (Correo electrónico):
Phone Number (Número de teléfono):
Program Title (Título del programa):
fields.rationale: This is the official program name for the NASA Science account as specified in the reference values.

fields.label: Address of the Program (Dirección del programa):

sections.description: General information about the federal program or sub-agency involved.

fields.label:
Federal Agency or Sub-Agency (see here for an index of agencies: https://www.usa.gov/federal-agencies)

Agencia federal o subagencia (consulte aquí para obtener el índice de las agencias:  https://www.usa.gov/federal-agencies)
fields.rationale: NASA is the primary federal agency for this request.

fields.label: Appropriations subcommittee (Subcomité de asignación):
options: Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration (AG) | Agricultura, Desarrollo Rural, Administración de Alimentos y Medicamentos
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies (CJS) | Comercio, Justicia, Ciencia y Agencias Relacionadas (CJS)
Defense | Defensa
Energy and Water Development and Related Agencies (EW) | Energía y Desarrollo de los Recursos Hídricos y Agencias Relacionadas
Financial Services and General Government (FSGG) | Servicios Financieros y del Gobierno General
Homeland Security (HS) | Seguridad Nacional
Interior, Environment, and Related Agencies (INT) | Interior, Medio Ambiente y Agencias Relacionadas
Labor, Health and Human Services, Education (Labor-HHS) | Trabajo, Salud y Servicios Humanos y Educación
Legislative Branch | Rama Legislativa
Military Construction, Veterans Affairs, and Related Agencies (Mil-Con) | Construcción Militar, Asuntos de Veteranos y Agencias Relacionadas
State, Foreign Operations, and Related Programs (SFOPS) | Estado, Operaciones Exteriores y Programas Relacionados
Transportation, Housing and Urban Development, and Related Agencies (THUD) | Transporte, Vivienda y Desarrollo Urbano y Agencias Relacionadas
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies (CJS) | Comercio, Justicia, Ciencia y Agencias Relacionadas (CJS)
fields.rationale: NASA funding falls under the Commerce, Justice, Science (CJS) subcommittee.

fields.label: New or Existing Program (Programa nuevo o existente):
options: New (Nuevo)
Existing (Existente)
fields.rationale: The Science Mission Directorate is an existing program within NASA.

fields.label: Summary of Program Request (Resumen de la solicitud de programa):
fields.draft_value:
* Funding request of $9,000,000,000 for NASA's Science Mission Directorate (SMD) in FY2027
* Supports a balanced portfolio of missions in planetary science, astrophysics, heliophysics, and earth science
* Ensures the continuation of high-priority missions as defined by the National Academies' Decadal Surveys
fields.rationale: Directly states the $9 billion funding ask for the Science Mission Directorate as specified in the reference values.

sections.description: Specify the nature of the request (funding, bill language, or report language).

fields.label: Program, Bill Language, or Report Language (Solicitud de programa, texto legislativo o texto para un informe legislativo)
options: Program (Funding) / Programa (Fondos)
Bill Language (Texto legislativo)
Report Language (Texto para un informe legislativo)
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic funding request for the SMD topline budget.

sections.header: Funding Request Information (Información de solicitud de financiamiento)
sections.description: Details regarding the dollar amount and funding levels requested.

fields.label: Funding Level (Nivel de financiamento):
options: Support Total Funding Request of (Apoyar la solicitud de financiamiento total de)
Support Enacted Level of (Apoyar el nivel aprobado de)
Support the Funding Level in the President's Budget request (Apoyar los niveles en la solicitud del presupuesto del presidente)
Reduce Funding (Reducir financiación)
Eliminate Funding (Eliminar financiación)
Increase Funding (Incrementar financiación)
fields.draft_value: Support Total Funding Request of (Apoyar la solicitud de financiamiento total de)
fields.rationale: The request is for a specific funding target of $9 billion as part of the programmatic ask.

fields.label: Amount (Cantidad):
fields.rationale: The reference values specify a funding ask of $9,000,000,000.

fields.label: Additional Comments (Comentarios adicionales):
fields.draft_value:
* NASA Science is a critical front in the global space race, specifically regarding strategic competition with China's lunar and Mars programs
* Sustained investment is required to maintain the aerospace workforce and specialized technical capabilities developed over decades
* Restoring funding provides the stability needed for long-term mission planning and industrial base certainty
fields.rationale: Utilizes advocacy talking points regarding international competition and workforce stability to provide strategic context for the request.

sections.header: Report Language Request (Solicitud de texto para un informe legislativo)
sections.description: Specifics for requests involving report language.

fields.label: Text of Proposed Language (Texto de la propuesta):
fields.rationale: The request context explicitly states that no report or bill language is requested for this programmatic funding item.

fields.label: Brief description of and justification for the request (Breve descripci3n y justificaci3n de la solicitud):
fields.draft_value:
* A $9 billion investment in NASA Science supports U.S. global leadership and advances peer-reviewed scientific priorities
* Every dollar invested in NASA returns roughly $3 to the economy, driving growth in the aerospace, innovation, and R&D sectors
* Funding restores stability to programs following recent fiscal volatility, protecting thousands of jobs across the national supply chain
fields.rationale: Justifies the $9B ask using the provided economic impact data ($3 return per $1 spent) and the theme of U.S. leadership.

fields.label: Texas 29th Congressional District Impact (Impacto en el distrito 29 de Texas en el Congreso federal de los Estados Unidos):
fields.draft_value:
* NASA Science programs invested $122,527,446.14 into TX-29 businesses and institutions between FY2023 and FY2025
* Supports critical high-tech jobs at local firms like Yulista Solutions, LLC, which provides essential aircraft support for NASA operations
* Strengthens the local Houston-area STEM talent pipeline and supports the broader aerospace economy in the district
fields.rationale: Cites the specific $122.5M obligation figure for TX-29 and the active contract with Yulista Solutions, LLC from the provided spending data.

sections.header: Bill Language Request (Solicitud de texto legislativo)
sections.description: Specifics for requests involving bill language.

fields.label: Text of Proposed Language (Texto legislativo propuesto):
fields.rationale: The request context explicitly states that no report or bill language is requested for this programmatic funding item.

fields.label: Brief description of and justification for the request (Breve descripci3n y justificaci3n de la solicitud):
fields.rationale: This appears to be a duplicate field for a different request type; programmatic justification was provided in the primary description field.

fields.label: Texas 29th Congressional District Impact (Impacto en el distrito 29 de Texas en el Congreso federal de los Estados Unidos):
fields.rationale: This appears to be a duplicate field for a different request type; district impact was provided in the primary impact field.

sections.header: Member of Congress Leading the Request (El miembro del Congreso encabezando la solicitud)
sections.description: Information about congressional leadership for this request.

fields.label: Member of Congress, if known (Nombre del Congresista, si se sabe):
fields.draft_value: Reps. Don Bacon (R-NE) and Judy Chu (D-CA)
fields.rationale: These members are identified in the reference values as leading the existing House letter for this request.

fields.label: If no member of Congress is leading on this request, are you requesting Congresswoman Sylvia Garcia lead this request? (¿Necesita que la congresista Sylvia García encabece la petición?)
options: Yes (Sí)
No (No)
fields.rationale: A multi-member letter already exists led by Reps. Bacon and Chu, so a new lead request to Rep. Garcia is not strictly necessary unless she chooses to co-lead.

fields.label: Staff Contact, if known (Contacto del empleado, si se sabe):
Staff Email, if known (Correo electrónico del empleado, si se sabe):
